mapper.sql: select p.product_id, p.merchant_id, m.company_name as merchant_name, p.category_id, c.category_code, c.category_name, p.product_name, p.subtitle, p.detail, p.cover_url, p.price, p.stock, p.sales_count, p.status as product_status, p.del_flag, p.create_time as product_create_time, p.update_time as product_update_time, p.remark from shop_product p inner join shop_merchant m on m.merchant_id = p.merchant_id and m.del_flag = '0' inner join shop_product_category c on c.category_id = p.category_id
mapper.select: select category_id, category_code, category_name, category_sort, status as category_status, create_time as category_create_time, update_time as category_update_time from shop_product_category where status = '0' order by category_sort, category_id

select category_id, category_code, category_name, category_sort, status as category_status, create_time as category_create_time, update_time as category_update_time from shop_product_category where category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.update: update shop_product_category set category_name = #{categoryName}, category_sort = #{categorySort}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where category_id = #{categoryId} and category_code in ('CATEGORY_1', 'CATEGORY_2', 'CATEGORY_3', 'CATEGORY_4')
mapper.select: where p.product_id = #{productId} and p.merchant_id = #{merchantId} and p.del_flag = '0'
where p.product_id = #{productId} and p.status = 'ON_SALE' and p.del_flag = '0' and m.audit_status = 'APPROVED' and m.status = '0' and c.status = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into shop_product (merchant_id, category_id, product_name, subtitle, detail, cover_url, price, stock, sales_count, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{merchantId}, #{categoryId}, #{productName}, #{subtitle}, #{detail}, #{coverUrl}, #{price}, #{stock}, 0, 'DRAFT', '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update shop_product set category_id = #{categoryId}, product_name = #{productName}, subtitle = #{subtitle}, detail = #{detail}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where product_id = #{productId} and merchant_id = #{merchantId} and del_flag = '0'
update shop_product set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where product_id = #{productId} and merchant_id = #{merchantId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into shop_product_image (product_id, image_url, image_sort, create_time) values (#{productId}, #{imageUrl}, #{imageSort}, sysdate())
